_comment: IAM Policies for Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure Lab

lab-sg-updater-policy._purpose: Allows the self-healing EC2 script to read and modify ONLY the lab-secure-edge-sg security group. Cannot modify any other SG.

lab-s3-backup-writeonly-policy._purpose: Write-only S3 access for backup scripts. No delete permission — protects backups from ransomware or compromised credentials.
lab-s3-backup-writeonly-policy._design_note: Even if EC2 or centos-vm2 is fully compromised and the attacker finds these credentials, they cannot delete backups. S3 versioning ensures previous versions are recoverable.
